creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Robert Clausecker from comment #3)

There is no changelog.  The change is already described in the commit message.  Please apply with 'git am', and only then amend if need be.

Yes, I know the address is different, but so far I have preferred to keep a single Bugzilla account.  I may create a new account in the future.

Thanks.
